title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 48.
content:
There was an Old Person of Mold,
    Who shrank from sensations of cold;
    So he purchased some muffs,
    Some furs and some fluffs,
    And wrapped himself from the cold.
meaning:
Edward Lear's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 48."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
